## Problem Statement

What protocol/process problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe your current idea at a high level.

## BIPD Type

Select one:

- [ ] Standard
- [ ] Meta
- [ ] Informational

## Related Decisions and References

List relevant D-* canonical decisions and prior BIPDs.

## Open Questions

List questions where reviewer input is needed.
